summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm based in Westerville, Ohio, providing penetration testing, virtual CISO, compliance readiness (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI), SOC, and incident response for U.S. organizations. It was an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework alongside Microsoft, IBM, DHS, and DoD.
